HEATF 6148(3), AT 30 fawreaw 2022 % wreaw & Fenfaa frar war am MINISTRY OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION (Department of Food and Public Distribution) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th December, 2023 S.0. 5241(E).—In pursuance of the provisions of Schedule I to the National Food Security Act, 2013 (20 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, Department of Food and Public Distribution, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.0. 6148 (E), dated the 30" December, 2022, namely:- In the said notification, for the words, figures and letters “31st of December, 20237, the words, figures and letters “31st of December, 2028 shall be substituted. [F. No. 15-33/2022-NFSA] PALKA SAHNI, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.0. 3577(E), dated the 29th November, 2016 and subsequently amended vide numbers S.0O. 1003(E), dated the 30th March, 2017, S.0. 2041(E), dated the 29" June, 2017, S.0. 3127(E) dated the 27th June, 2018, S.0. 3546(E) dated the 30th September, 2019 and S.0. 6148 (E) dated the 30" December, 2022.
